description: Comprehensive evals for Contextia MCP skill v3.1. Covers all 26 tools, current output format (human-readable text + structuredContent), sandbox_ref/retrieve flow, cross-repo tools, progressive disclosure, compaction archive, and Anthropic best practices.

categories.triggering: Skill loads on relevant queries, does NOT load on unrelated ones
categories.routing: Correct tool selected for each task type
categories.workflow: Multi-step workflows execute in correct order
categories.token_efficiency: Agent uses compact tools instead of verbose alternatives
categories.output_format: Agent correctly reads human-readable text output and handles sandbox_ref
categories.new_tools: retrieve, repo_add/remove/status, forget, knowledge, introspect used correctly

evals.name: trigger-index-project
evals.prompt: Index this project at /Users/alice/platform so I can search it.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill loads. Agent calls index('/Users/alice/platform'), then polls status() until indexed: true.

assertions.text: index() is called with the correct path
assertions.passing_condition: index tool called with path='/Users/alice/platform'

assertions.text: Agent polls status() after index before searching
assertions.passing_condition: status() called after index() and before any search/find_symbol call

evals.name: trigger-search-codebase
evals.prompt: Search the codebase for how rate limiting is implemented.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill loads. Agent calls search('rate limiting implementation') as first action.

assertions.text: search() is called, not grep or readFile
assertions.passing_condition: search tool called, not grep or readFile
find_callers called with 'authenticate'

evals.name: trigger-what-breaks
evals.prompt: What breaks if I change the TokenBudget class?

assertions.passing_condition: impact called with 'TokenBudget'

evals.name: trigger-git-history
evals.prompt: What changed in the search pipeline last week?
evals.expected_behavior: Skill loads. Agent calls commit_search('search pipeline changes') or commit_history.

assertions.passing_condition: commit_search or commit_history called, not git log shell command

evals.name: trigger-retrieve-sandbox
evals.prompt: Retrieve the full results for sandbox reference sx_abc12345.

assertions.text: retrieve() is called with the ref_id
assertions.passing_condition: retrieve called with ref_id='sx_abc12345'

evals.name: trigger-add-repo
evals.prompt: Add the backend repo at /Users/alice/backend so I can search across both projects.

assertions.text: repo_add() is called with the path
assertions.passing_condition: repo_add called with path='/Users/alice/backend'

evals.name: trigger-compact-archive
evals.prompt: Archive this session's context before compaction happens.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill loads. Agent calls compact(content) with session context.

assertions.passing_condition: compact called with content summarizing session

evals.name: trigger-recall-archive
evals.prompt: Search the compaction archive for what I found about the database schema.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill loads. Agent calls recall('database schema', memory_type='archive').

assertions.passing_condition: recall called with memory_type='archive' and database schema query

evals.name: no-trigger-general-coding
evals.prompt: Write a Python function that reverses a string.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill does NOT load. Agent answers directly without calling any Contextia tools.

assertions.passing_condition: No index/search/find_symbol/explain/impact or other Contextia tool called

evals.name: no-trigger-general-question
evals.prompt: What is the difference between TCP and UDP?
evals.expected_behavior: Skill does NOT load. Agent answers from knowledge.

assertions.passing_condition: No Contextia tools called

evals.name: routing-find-symbol-vs-search
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls find_symbol('IndexingPipeline') — exact name known, not a broad concept.

assertions.passing_condition: find_symbol called with 'IndexingPipeline'

evals.name: routing-search-for-concept
evals.prompt: How does the caching layer work?
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls search('caching layer') — broad concept, not an exact symbol name.

assertions.text: search() is called for the broad concept
assertions.passing_condition: search called with a caching-related query

evals.name: routing-impact-before-refactor
evals.prompt: I want to delete the FlashReranker class. Is that safe?
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls impact('FlashReranker') before answering. Never suggests deletion without impact analysis.

assertions.text: impact() is called before any deletion suggestion
assertions.passing_condition: impact called with 'FlashReranker'

assertions.text: Agent does not suggest deletion without impact first
assertions.passing_condition: Response does not recommend deletion before impact analysis

evals.name: routing-explain-vs-readfile
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls explain('ReciprocalRankFusion') — not readFile on fusion.py.

assertions.passing_condition: explain called with 'ReciprocalRankFusion'

assertions.text: readFile is not called before explain
assertions.passing_condition: No readFile on fusion.py before explain

evals.name: routing-overview-for-structure
evals.prompt: How many files are in this project and what languages does it use?
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls overview() — not ls, glob, or directory listing.

assertions.passing_condition: overview() called

assertions.text: No shell ls or glob before overview
assertions.passing_condition: No ls or glob command before overview

evals.name: routing-bm25-for-exact-identifier
evals.prompt: Find all occurrences of CTX_STORAGE_DIR in the codebase.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls search('CTX_STORAGE_DIR', mode='bm25') — exact identifier, BM25 is best.

assertions.passing_condition: search called with mode='bm25' or mode='keyword'
